mkdir -p $WORK/b001/exe/
cd .
GOROOT='' /usr/lib/go/pkg/tool/linux_amd64/link -o $WORK/b001/exe/a.out -importcfg $WORK/b001/importcfg.link -installsuffix shared -X=runtime.godebugDefault=containermaxprocs=0,cryptocustomrand=1,decoratemappings=0,tlssecpmlkem=0,tlssha1=1,updatemaxprocs=0,urlstrictcolons=0,x509sha256skid=0 -buildmode=pie -buildid=LS9K2-Yx1lzJoZM8Q3Kn/pyEV3RNs6YcWJTKbfFXO/aUFH9lUt7QO5W-hX2nOH/LS9K2-Yx1lzJoZM8Q3Kn -w -X github.com/docker/compose/v5/internal.Version=v5.0.1 -extld=x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-gcc $WORK/b001/_pkg_.a
go tool buildid -w $WORK/b001/exe/a.out # internal
mkdir -p ./bin/build/
cp $WORK/b001/exe/a.out ./bin/build/docker-compose
rm -rf $WORK/b001/
